goal: 可爱、有食欲、干净；像生活模拟游戏里的温暖小厨房，但不复刻任何现有 IP。

typography.preferred_zh: PingFang SC / MiSans / Noto Sans CJK SC / system-ui rounded fallback

components.primary_button: tomato fill, chocolate border optional, white label
components.secondary_button: butter or mint fill, chocolate label
components.cards: card fill, warm border, soft shadow only for main cards
components.chips: rounded pill, low saturation fills, warm border
components.tabbar: card white, warm border, very soft shadow, active uses cream/butter capsule background

avoid: directly copying Animal Crossing/Nintendo characters or logos
